name: Gum-Gum Jet Gatling (Reprint)
effect_text: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.[Trigger] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
